name: PRs with open CRITICAL findings cannot be merged
description: Pull requests that have one or more open findings with severity CRITICAL — from static analysis, security scanning, or code review — are denied merge until all CRITICAL findings are resolved or explicitly accepted with a documented justification.

policy.rationale: CRITICAL findings represent known, high-severity defects. Merging code with open CRITICAL findings ships a known defect. The bar for an accepted-with-justification exception should be very high.
